overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring a dark, bioluminescent canyon at night. The character walks along a glowing path lined with torches through rocky terrain and ancient forests, approaching a distant lit settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon with bioluminescent stream

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow canyon following the glowing blue path between rocky walls

entered.detail: tall moss-covered rock wall forming the left boundary of the canyon
steep rock face with patches of snow forming the right boundary
bioluminescent blue-green ground covering the walking path
wooden post with burning flame providing warm orange light
tall thin evergreen tree growing from the cliffside

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed canyon at night, flanked by steep rocky walls. The ground emits a bioluminescent blue glow, and a single torch post provides warm lighting on the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open ravine with torch-lit trail leading to distant mountains

events.description: exits narrow canyon into wider ravine with expanded sky view and distant mountain structures visible

agents.ego_description: continuing along the glowing path as the terrain opens up, revealing distant settlement lights

entered.detail: dark mountain silhouette with orange lights marking a distant settlement or path
series of torch posts receding into the distance marking the trail

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens into a wide ravine under a starry night sky. The rocky walls fall away to the sides as distant mountain structures with orange lights become visible ahead. Multiple torches now line the right side of the bioluminescent path.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient forest approach to torch-lit settlement

events.description: entering denser vegetation area with large twisted ancient trees and approaching settlement structures

agents.ego_description: approaching the settlement entrance marked by multiple torches and large gnarled trees

entered.detail: large twisted tree with sprawling branches and moss-covered trunk
multiple warm light sources indicating buildings or campfires in the distance
cluster of burning torches marking the left side of the approach

segments.scene_description: The path leads into a denser area with ancient twisted trees and rocky outcrops. The character approaches a settlement entrance marked by numerous torches on both sides. The bioluminescent path continues toward the warm lights of distant structures ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, bioluminescent canyon that gradually opens into a wide ravine and leads toward a torch-lit settlement. It begins within an enclosed rocky corridor at night, where a single torch casts a warm glow over a path of shimmering blue light. As the camera advances, the steep walls fall away to reveal a vast ravine under a starry sky, with the path expanding and more torches appearing alongside the glowing ground. The scene then shifts into a denser landscape of ancient twisted trees and rocky outcrops, narrowing the focus toward a settlement entrance. Finally, the camera moves through a corridor of numerous torches on both sides, heading toward the warm lights of distant structures.
